content: Install supabase-py backend + @supabase/supabase-js frontend; update .env files
Generate complete SQL migration file (tables + RLS + storage buckets + indexes + FTS)
Rewrite backend: deps.py, auth.py, cases.py, messaging.py, admin.py, seed.py to use Supabase (drop Mongo)
Rewrite frontend auth: supabase.js client, auth.jsx, Login.jsx, Register.jsx, AuthCallback.jsx
Localize to India (map defaults, examples, IST) and fix Leaflet rendering (invalidateSize + container height)
Configure CORS + env for Render (backend) + Vercel (frontend) + Supabase; write DEPLOY.md
USER ACTION REQUIRED: Run SQL migration in Supabase SQL Editor
After migration: backend seeds users; test end-to-end
